revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Atago Faith]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Created page with "{{Navbox | name = User:Immanuelle/Atago Faith | title = Atago Faith | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Isonokami.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{ill|Futsu-no-mitama|ja|布都御魂|en:draft}} * {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|fr|Nigihayahi|simple|User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi|en:draft}} |group2 = Shrines |list2 = * {{ill|Isonokami Shrine|en}} |group3= Clan |list3= * {{ill|Mononobe clan|en}} |group6 = Misc |list6 = * {{ill|Prince Inis..."
32 revisions imported: importing Atago Faith Template
Immanuelle moved page [[User:Immanuelle/Atago Faith]] to [[Template:Atago Faith]]
Copying from [[Category:Original pages]] to [[Category:original pages]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Atago Shrines]] to [[Category:Atago shrines]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
1 revision imported: attributing page creation to myself as per first edit summary
1 revision imported: attributing page creation to myself as per first edit summary
1 revision imported: attributing page creation to myself as per first edit summary
Moving from [[Category:Original pages]] to [[Category:Pages needing attribution]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:pages needing attribution]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
fixing the category error and removing kk
Copying from [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] to [[Category:qq-{{subst:PAGENAME}}-qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] to [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Moving from [[Category:Completion tier 2]] to [[Category:Completion tier 3]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "|オオヤマツミ" to "|オオヤマツミ|1=Ōyamatsumi"
Text replacement - "|月次祭}}" to "|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri}}"
Text replacement - "{{ill|Category" to "[[Category:pages with interlanguage linked categories]]{{ill|Category"
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages with interlanguage linked categories]]{{ill|Category:Shinto templates|en}}" to "[[Category:Shinto templates]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages with interlanguage linked categories]]{{ill|Category:Shinto cult templates|en}}" to "[[Category:Shinto cult templates]]"
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Text replacement - "|伊香色雄" to "|伊香色雄|1=Ikagashiko-o"
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"

Replaced content with "{{Navbox | name = Atago Faith | title = Atago Faith | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Atago-jinja (Kyoto) entrance.JPG|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{ill|Atago Gongen|en}} * {{ill|Izanagi|en|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Ame-no-oshihomimi|en}} * {{ill|Kagu-tsuchi|en|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Izanami|en}} * <!--[[Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]]--> * {{ill|Haniyasu-hiko and Haniyasu-hime|lt=Haniyasuhime no Mikoto |en|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Amenokumahito no Mikoto|j..."
Removing from [[Category:Templates with draft categories]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "五十瓊敷入彦命|" to "五十瓊敷入彦命|1=Itsuninomikoto|2=ja|3=五十瓊敷入彦命|"
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"

Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: replace {{ill}} with enwiki link via Wikidata
Bot: remove deleted category Original templates
Bot: remove deleted category Shinbutsu Shugo
Bot: remove deleted category Shintoshrines in Fukuoka Prefecture
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Text replacement - "[[simple:" to "[[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]]" to "[[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]][[simple:"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: undo wikidata additions from past 2 hours
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q125475295)
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 8 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23208182735|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Atago_Faith here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Atago_Faith for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Navbox
| name  = Atago Faith
| title = Atago Faith
| listclass = hlist
| image = [[File:Atago-jinja (Kyoto) entrance.JPG|150px|link=|alt=]]
 |group1 = Main Deities
 |list1 =
* {{ill|Atago Gongen|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Gongen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Gongen|qq=}}
* {{ill|Izanagi|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izanagi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izanagi|qq=}}
* {{ill|Ame-no-oshihomimi|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-oshihomimi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-oshihomimi|qq=}}
* {{ill|Kagu-tsuchi|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagu-tsuchi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagu-tsuchi|qq=}}
* {{ill|Izanami|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izanami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izanami|qq=}}
* <!--[[:en:Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]]-->
* {{ill|Haniyasu-hiko and Haniyasu-hime|lt=Haniyasuhime no Mikoto|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haniyasu-hiko and Haniyasu-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haniyasu-hiko and Haniyasu-hime|qq=}}
* {{ill|Wakumusubi|WD=Q10921330|lt=Wakumusubi no Kami|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakumusubi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakumusubi|qq=}}
* {{ill|Toyouke-Ōmikami|lt=Toyoukebime no Mikoto|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke-Ōmikami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyouke-Ōmikami|qq=}}<!--===''Wakamiya''===-->
* {{ill|Raijin|lt=Ikazuchi no Kami|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raijin|qq=}}
* <!--[[Kagutsuchi|Kagutsuchi no Mikoto]]-->
* {{ill|Hamushi no Kami|ja|破无神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamushi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamushi no Kami|qq=}}<!--===''Okumiya''===-->
* {{ill|Ōkuninushi|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=}}<!--Tokyo gods-->
* [[:en:Mizuhanome|Mizuhanome]]
* [[:en:Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi]] <!--(オオヤマヅミノミコト)-->
* [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru]] <!--(ヤマトタケルノミコト)-->
* {{ill|Kṣitigarbha|lt=Shogun Jizo Bosatsu|ja|勝軍地蔵菩薩|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kṣitigarbha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kṣitigarbha|qq=}} <!--(ショウグンジゾウボサツ)-->
* [[:en:Samantabhadra (Bodhisattva)|Fugen Daibosatsu]] <!--(フゲンダイボサツ)-->
 |group3 = Three Great Shrines
 |list3 =

* {{ill|Atago Shrine (Kyoto)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Shrine (Kyoto)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Shrine (Kyoto)|qq=}}  
'''Head of the network
* {{ill|Atago Shrine (Tokyo)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Shrine (Tokyo)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Shrine (Tokyo)|qq=}}
* {{ill|Washio Atago Shrine|ja|%E9%B7%B2%E5%B0%BE%E6%84%9B%E5%AE%95%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE|simple|Washio_Atago_Shrine|en:draft|fr|Washio Atago-jinja|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Washio Atago Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Washio Atago Shrine|qq=}}

|group4= Lesser shrines
|list4=

* {{ill|Atagoyama Kofun (Mito)|lt=Atago Shrine|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atagoyama Kofun (Mito)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atagoyama Kofun (Mito)|qq=}}
* {{ill|Atagoyama Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atagoyama Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atagoyama Kofun|qq=}}
* {{ill|Atago Shrine|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Shrine|qq=}}
* {{ill|Kifune Shrine|simple|Kifune Shrine|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kifune Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kifune Shrine|qq=}}

|1group6 = Misc
|1list6 =
* {{ill|Prince Inishiki|ja|五十瓊敷入彦命|1=Prince Inishikiirihiko|2=ja|3=五十瓊敷入彦命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Inishiki|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Inishikiirihiko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Inishiki|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Inishikiirihiko|qq=}}
* ''{{ill|Tokusa-no-Kandakara|ja|十種神宝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokusa-no-Kandakara|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokusa-no-Kandakara|qq=}}''
* ''{{ill|Kokitsunemaru|ja|小狐丸|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokitsunemaru|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokitsunemaru|qq=}}'', an ''{{ill|ōdachi|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ōdachi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ōdachi|qq=}}'' forged by {{ill|Sanjō Munechika|it|Munechika|ja|三条宗近|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Munechika|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanjō Munechika|qq=}}
* {{ill|Chinkon-sai|ja|鎮魂祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinkon-sai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinkon-sai|qq=}}
* {{ill|Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=}}

|1group5= People
|1list5=
* {{ill|Isonokami no Maro|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami no Maro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isonokami no Maro|qq=}}
* {{ill|Mononobe no Okoshi|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mononobe no Okoshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mononobe no Okoshi|qq=}}
* {{ill|Mononobe no Arakabi|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mononobe no Arakabi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mononobe no Arakabi|qq=}}
* {{ill|Mononobe no Moriya|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mononobe no Moriya|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mononobe no Moriya|qq=}}
* {{ill|Ikagashikome|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikagashikome|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikagashikome|qq=}}
* {{ill|Ikagashikoo|simple|Ikagashikoo|ja|伊香色雄|1=Ikagashiko-o|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikagashikoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikagashiko-o|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikagashikoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikagashiko-o|qq=}}

}}<noinclude>
